name: compare_products
description: Use this whenever a user asks to compare products (A vs B, which is better, compare X and Y). Use this instead of guessing about product differences.

products.description: List of 2-10 product names or identifiers to compare (e.g., ['MacBook Pro 14', 'Dell XPS 15', 'iPhone 15 Pro'])

market.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., 'US', 'SG'). Defaults to 'US'.

decision_criteria.description: What aspects to compare (e.g., ['price', 'rating', 'battery_life', 'features', 'weight']). If not specified, compares all available criteria.

use_when: User asks 'which is better: C or D'
User asks 'X or Y - which should I buy'
User asks for pros and cons of competing products

response_fields.comparison: Side-by-side comparison of products across criteria
